  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/programData/getLatestVersionForProgram/{programId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve the latest version for a specific program

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the program to retrieve the latest version for","in":"path","name":"programId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}}]}

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
